text: Wire rope should be condemned if more than

options.text: 10% of the wires are broken in a length of eight diameters
12% of the wires are broken in a length of eight diameters
12% of the wires are broken in a length of eight diameters
9% of the wires are broken in a length of eight diameters

explanation: Wire rope is condemned if more than 10% of its wires are broken within any length of eight diameters. This threshold indicates significant wear and potential loss of structural integrity, posing a safety hazard.
